steps.expected: App loads with chain selector visible
steps.observed: App loaded with chain combobox showing 'Base (8453)' as current selection

steps.action: Click chain combobox to expand dropdown
steps.expected: Dropdown opens showing all chains with search input
steps.observed: Dropdown expanded showing all 7 chains (Base, Ethereum, Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon, BSC, Avalanche) with placeholder 'Search chain name or ID...'

steps.action: Type 'base' into the combobox search input
steps.expected: List filters in real-time to show matching chains
steps.observed: List filtered in real-time as each character was typed, showing only 'Base (8453)' after typing 'base'

evidence.consoleErrors: none (only favicon.ico 404 - cosmetic, documented as ignore)

steps.observed: Filtered to show only 'Base (8453)' - case-insensitive match worked correctly
Filtered to show only 'Ethereum (1)' - partial name match 'eth' correctly matched 'Ethereum'

steps.action: Clear filter, type 'eth' to filter to Ethereum
steps.observed: Only 'Ethereum (1)' option shown in filtered list

steps.expected: Chain selector updates to Ethereum, default tokens change to Ethereum addresses
steps.observed: Chain changed to 'Ethereum (1)'. From Token updated to 'USDC (0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48)' (Ethereum USDC). To Token updated to 'WETH (0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2)' (Ethereum WETH). Dropdown closed after selection.

steps.action: With dropdown open and 'Ethereum (1)x' typed (no match state), select all text and delete
steps.expected: Full chain list restored showing all 7 chains
steps.observed: All 7 chains restored: Ethereum (1), Base (8453), Arbitrum (42161), Optimism (10), Polygon (137), BSC (56), Avalanche (43114). Placeholder 'Search chain name or ID...' reappeared.

steps.action: With dropdown open, type 'zzzzz' (no matching chain)
steps.expected: Empty list or 'no matches' message displayed
steps.observed: Dropdown showed 'No chains match' message in italics. No chain options visible. Listbox contained only the 'No chains match' text element (not a selectable option).

frictions.description: The combobox toggle behavior: clicking the combobox when already focused toggles it closed instead of keeping it open. This makes it slightly tricky to reopen after selection - you need to type a character or click twice to reopen. This is standard combobox behavior but worth noting.
frictions.resolution: Used keyboard typing to open/filter the dropdown instead of relying on click to reopen

frictions.description: When the combobox is opened after a chain has been selected, the current chain's display text (e.g. 'Ethereum (1)') appears in the input and must be fully cleared before typing a new filter. Typing appends to existing text rather than replacing it.
frictions.resolution: Used Cmd+A then Backspace to select-all and clear before typing new filter text

summary: Tested 6 assertions (VAL-UI-050 through VAL-UI-055): all 6 passed. The chain searchable dropdown correctly supports text input filtering, filters by chain name (case-insensitive partial match), filters by chain ID, allows selection from filtered results with proper default token updates, restores the full list when the filter is cleared, and shows a 'No chains match' message when no chains match the filter.
